user_story: As an Employee, I want to view my learning requests with program name, learning type, sponsorship, result and status, so that I can track the progress of each request
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Learning Requests screen; When the page loads; Then my requests are listed with columns Program name, Learning type, Sponsorship / Reimbursement, Reattempt / Renewal, Result, Status and Task

user_story: As an Employee, I want to raise a learning request, so that I can request enrollment in a training program or certification
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Learning Requests screen; When I click Raise a learning request; Then a new learning request form is opened for me to submit

user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter my learning requests by learning type, so that I can focus on a specific category of learning
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Learning Requests screen; When I select a Learning type and click Search; Then only requests matching that learning type are shown

user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter my learning requests by status such as Pending approval, Approved, Rejected, Cancelled or Requested, so that I can see requests in a particular state
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Learning Requests screen; When I select a Status and click Search; Then only requests with that status are shown

user_story: As an Employee, I want to reset the search filters, so that I can clear my selections and view all my learning requests again
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied filters on the My Learning Requests screen; When I click Reset; Then the filters return to All and the full list is displayed

user_story: As an Employee, I want to see and act on tasks associated with a learning request, so that I can complete any pending actions on my requests
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Learning Requests screen; When a request has an associated task; Then the Task column shows the action I can take on that request
